title: Seeded Known Context stash-list count error (actual 6, seeded said 5)
claim: strategy.md:102 states git stash list has 5 entries; independently re-run wc -l = 6 (stash@{0}..@{5}). Substance holds (none reference 009/032) but count off by one.
evidenceRefs: git stash list output: 6 entries (028-baseline-check, 028-WIP, main-wip-before-028, main-Stash-previous, 023A3.1-fixes, 008-revert-stash)
counterevidenceSought: re-checked whether any of 6 touches 032/009 -- NO, all scoped to other branches/topics
alternativeExplanation: count taken before a 6th stash was created mid-session; either way recorded figure currently inaccurate

title: Ownership claim asserted across ~12 packet-032 docs with no cited verification and zero external corroboration
claim: owned-by-a-separate-session phrasing repeated across spec.md/changelog/before-vs-after/timeline/phases 001,006,010,011; none cite HOW established; tight repo-wide grep excl 032 = 0 matches; prior review-report.md treated ownership as out-of-scope
evidenceRefs: review/review-report.md (ownership never audited, only stale goal.md filename DR-006-P2-001)
counterevidenceSought: independent corroboration -- second packet referencing phase-009 coordination, lock/pid naming impl work, observability event, post-checkpoint commit. Found NONE.
alternativeExplanation: phrase may be forward-looking reservation (earmarked-for) not live-ownership; handover.md:32-33 is future-tense TO-next-session, consistent with reservation reading making claim non-falsifiable-by-design
upgradeTrigger: operator confirms no second session exists (docs actively misleading) OR two sessions collide on phase 009
downgradeTrigger: operator confirms phrase always intended as forward-looking reservation (reword, not defect)

claim: seeded local-evidence figures a-e (git status clean, single checkpoint commit, stale mtimes, no impl lock, reflog clean) re-derived independently
evidence: repo-wide find *.lock/*.pid: only phase-009 lock is review/.deep-review.lock (this session's)

result: multiple live opencode + MCP daemons; NONE identifiable as bound to phase 009; one is this review session
bearing: INCONCLUSIVE-NEUTRAL -- existence of opencode processes does not substantiate phase-009 owner
no deep-loop workflow ever logged event naming phase 009 implementation; caveat obs keys by workflow/session not path -> suggestive not conclusive
ownership phrasing UNIQUE to packet 032; no external packet claims coordination with phase-009 session

finding: no other packet makes analogous owned-by-another-session claim -> no positive base rate; deep-loop runs DO leave .deep-*.lock/.pid but implementation work has NO equivalent lock convention in this repo
implication: absence of impl lock is WEAK evidence of absence (convention absent for impl work); cannot be treated as strong evidence

reasoning: all local channels silent & independently re-verified; but impl has no lock convention, remote/detached session invisible to local git/lock/ps, live opencode processes ambiguous; claim reads operator-relayed not independently established
moveToRefuted: operator confirms reservation not live session

note: phase 009 safe to pick up PROVIDED operator confirms no other session active -- that single confirmation is the one thing local evidence cannot establish. D1 malformed graph-metadata.json is orthogonal, pre-existing, committed-as-is; does not block pickup (D4 sizes blast radius).
